summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GestorEPI landing page optimization. All core functionality working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: CORS headers not returned on OPTIONS requests
minor_bugs.impact: May cause issues with some browsers during preflight requests

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with all sections
Navigation menu smooth scroll functionality works
Contact form successfully submits data to backend
Backend /api/contact processes and sends email via Resend
Production build exists and is optimized (~344KB total)
